judgment.summary: High-growth, high-return business trading at a significant valuation premium.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 4.58 beat the 4.54 estimate, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth of 45.5% shows strong momentum.
Return on equity of 29.7% indicates high capital efficiency.
Total cash of $11.13B exceeds total debt of $10.23B.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $6.69B is substantial.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 53.66 and PEG of 5.19 suggest a high valuation.
Profit margin of 3.0% is quite thin.
Quick ratio of 0.54 indicates tight short-term liquidity.
Price/Book of 27.67 shows the stock trades at a high premium to book value.
